texto: What we don't let out traps us. We think, No one else feels this way, I must be crazy. So we don't say anything. And we become enveloped by a deep loneliness, not knowing where our feelings come from or what to do with them. Why do I feel this way?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sabrina Ward Harrison que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What we don't let out traps us. We think, No one else feels this way, I must be crazy. So we don'…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, crazy, feelings, com foco em feelings.

texto: I am afraid to show you who I really am, because if I show you who I really am, you might not like it--and that's all I got.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sabrina Ward Harrison: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a vida. O trecho “I am afraid to show you who I really am, because if I show you who I really am, you might not lik…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, people, verdade pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e verdade.
